overview.short: Surgad is a much-loved heritage city in Maharashtra, known for forts and architecture.
overview.description: Surgad (lit. “Gods Fort”), is a hill fort located in a spur, fragmented from the Sahyadri ranges of Maharashtra. The fort is situated near Roha, next to the village of Vaijanath in the Raigad district. This fort was an observation fort, which guarded the trade route along the Kundalika river from Sudhagad to Revdanda fort.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Dolwahal Dam
topPlaces.description: Dolwahal Dam, also called Weir Dam is an earthfill dam on Kundalika river near Roha, Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Karanja, Raigad
topPlaces.description: Karanja or Uran Island is a town in Uran, Raigad district of Maharashtra, India, about eight miles (13 km) long and four miles (6.4 km) broad. It lies in the south-east of Mumbai Harbour, about six miles (9.7 km) miles south-east of the Carnac pier in Mumbai (Bombay).

topPlaces.name: Dhatau
topPlaces.description: Dhatav is a Village in Roha Taluka in Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Ballaleshwar Pali
topPlaces.description: Ballaleshwar Pali is one of the eight temples of the Hindu God Ganesha. Among Ganesha temples, Ballaleshwar is the only one dedicated to Ganesha that is known by his devotee's name.

topPlaces.name: Pali, Raigad
topPlaces.description: Pali is a census town in Raigad District in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Sarasgad
topPlaces.description: Sarasgad fort is situated near village Pali in the Raigad district of Maharashtra. Pali lies about 10 kilometres East of Nagothane along the Nagothane-Khopoli road.

items.note: Dolwahal Dam, also called Weir Dam is an earthfill dam on Kundalika river near Roha, Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

Karanja or Uran Island is a town in Uran, Raigad district of Maharashtra, India, about eight miles (13 km) long and four miles (6.4 km) broad. It lies in the south-east of Mumbai Harbour, about six miles (9.7 km) miles south-east of the Carnac pier in Mumbai (Bombay).
Dhatav is a Village in Roha Taluka in Raigad district in the state of Maharashtra, India.
Ballaleshwar Pali is one of the eight temples of the Hindu God Ganesha. Among Ganesha temples, Ballaleshwar is the only one dedicated to Ganesha that is known by his devotee's name.
Pali is a census town in Raigad District in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
Sarasgad fort is situated near village Pali in the Raigad district of Maharashtra. Pali lies about 10 kilometres East of Nagothane along the Nagothane-Khopoli road.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Surgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Surgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Pune Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Surgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Surgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Surgad?
faq.a: Stays in Surgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Surgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Dolwahal Dam, Karanja, Raigad, Dhatau, Ballaleshwar Pali, Pali, Raigad.
